findings.detail: Cycle 1 source had an invalid node-to-subgraph edge (D --> SIDE) and malformed config block. Revised in cycle 2: cross-subgraph edges now target named nodes (D --> TA, D --> TB2), config block uses correct Mermaid v10 frontmatter structure. All source-level checks pass. PNG render was not attempted (mmdc not available in environment); visual inspection deferred to HITL #3.

stats.layout: flowchart LR (MAIN subgraph TB + SIDE subgraph TB)
stats.note: Source-level pass after 2 cycles. Visual pass cannot be confirmed without mmdc render. Recommend human inspect rendered output at HITL #3.
